        """

                    "employee_id": "E",  # too short

            (

                    "role": "Software Engineer",

                },
                "department",
                "E" * 100
            ),
        ]
    )
    def test_start_onboarding_invalid_field_values(self, client, payload, field, invalid_value):

        response = client.post("/start", json=payload)
